name: Coin on Base
description: $COIN is exactly what it sounds like. A coin on Base. No team. No roadmap. No dev wallet. No marketing budget. No influencers pretending they “found it early.” It’s a meme, but it’s also kind of not. Because the name is too obvious, the placement is too clean, and the timing is too perfect. Coinbase is the on-ramp for millions. Base is the chain they’re building everything on. And somehow, sitting right in the middle of that… is $COIN. Nothing promised. Nothing guaranteed. Just a ticker that makes sense. If you get it, you get it. If you don’t, you will later. No plan. No lies. Just $COIN.
